creator: dev@tripwire.com
text:
3D Labs X-Server is missing in 2.2.8 and 3.0 releases.

Fix: 

ftp down the binary ftp.xfree86.org for the XF86_3DLabs tarball.
How-To-Repeat: run /usr/X11R6/bin/XF86Setup

pick Creative Labs Blaster Exxtreme as the video card and wait for the
error: XF86_3DLabs not found.
